edge: variant of Nesterov Accelerated Gradient (NAG) used for asynchronous optimization in pipeline parallelism
enables training on small, interconnected devices by splitting model into multiple stages
offers 100% pipeline utilization by construction but leads to stale gradients
modified look-ahead step in NAG addresses staleness in gradients
converges at sublinear rate in presence of fixed delay
outperforms existing asynchronous methods and surpasses synchronous baseline in experiments
tested on large-scale language modelling tasks using decoder-only architectures with up to 1B parameters
